zh.lifeSummary: 當Bolesław II Rogatka Piast於1224年出生在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福時，他的父親Henryk II Pobożny Piast33歲，母親Anna Přemyslovna24歲。他於1242年與Hedwig von Anhalt結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1278年12月26日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉萊格尼尼卡享年54歲，埋葬在波蘭萊格尼尼次吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bolesław II Rogatka Piast于1224年出生在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福时，他的父亲Henryk II Pobożny Piast33岁，母亲Anna Přemyslovna24岁。他于1242年与Hedwig von Anhalt结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1278年12月26日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉萊格尼尼卡享年54岁，埋葬在波兰萊格尼尼次吉。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Bolesław II Rogatka Piast was born in 1224, in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland, his father, Henryk II Pobożny Piast, was 33 and his mother, Anna Přemyslovna, was 24. He married Hedwig von Anhalt in 1242. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 26 December 1278, in Legnica, Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 54, and was buried in Legnica, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bolesław II Rogatka Piast est né en 1224, à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne, son père, Henryk II Pobożny Piast, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anna Přemyslovna, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Anhalt en 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1278, à Legnica, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à legnickie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bolesław II Rogatka Piast 1224 in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henryk II Pobożny Piast 33 und seine Mutter Anna Přemyslovna 24. Er hat 1242 Hedwig von Anhalt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1278 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Liegnitz, Legnicki, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in legnickie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bolesław II Rogatka Piast è nato il nel 1224 nel Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Henryk II Pobożny Piast, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Anna Přemyslovna, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig von Anhalt nel 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 26 dicembre 1278, nel Legnica, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a legnickie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bolesław II Rogatka Piastが1224年にポーランドドルノsルaスキウロクlアウで生まれた時，父Henryk II Pobożny Piastは33歳，母Anna Přemyslovnaは24歳であった。1242年にHedwig von Anhaltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1278年12月26日にポーランドドルノsルaスキレグニクイレグニカで54歳で死去し，ポーランドレグニクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bolesław II Rogatka Piast(이)가 1224년 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henryk II Pobożny Piast(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Přemyslovna(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1242년 Hedwig von Anhalt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 12월 26일 폴란드 도노sa스키 레그닉키 레그니카에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 레그닉키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bolesław II Rogatka Piast nasceu em 1224, em Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Henryk II Pobożny Piast, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anna Přemyslovna, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Anhalt em 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1278, em Legnica, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em legnickie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bolesław II Rogatka Piast родился в 1224 г. в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша, его отцу по имени Henryk II Pobożny Piast было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Přemyslovna, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Anhalt в 1242 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 26 декабря 1278 г. в местности легника, легникки, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности легникки, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bolesław II Rogatka Piast nació en 1224, en Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia, su papá, Henryk II Pobożny Piast, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anna Přemyslovna, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hedwig von Anhalt en 1242. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1278, en Legnica, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en legnickie, Polonia.
